steps.title: Look for the shared trait
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between the Choctaw Code Talkers and the Navajo Code Talkers. The notes show that both groups transmitted coded military information in their native languages.

steps.title: Reject one-sided or contrast choices
steps.content: A discusses only the Choctaw Code Talkers, B discusses only the Navajo Code Talkers, and D emphasizes a difference in when the groups served. The correct sentence must name both groups and their shared use of native languages for coded messages. The answer is C.
